personality_one_liner: A cinematic, immersive, and premium dark-mode experience that makes content the hero, paired with sleek glassmorphic layers for social swiping.

spacing.rule: Generous cinematic spacing. Content sits flush to edges where possible (carousels bleed off-screen).

do's: Floating action buttons on swipe cards
Detail page bottom floating action bars

screens.name: Onboarding & Calibration
screens.purpose: Configure preferences (streaming platforms, genres) and rapid-swipe 20 titles to calibrate the recommendation engine.

states.error: Failed to load preferences. Retry button.

screens.layout: Step-by-step full-screen flow. Dark background. Genre selection uses brandTertiary tinted chips. Swipe calibration shows edge-to-edge cards with large Fraunces titles.

screens.name: Home (Recommendations)
screens.purpose: Discover personalized recommendations through horizontal carousels.

states.empty: No recommendations yet. CTA to calibrate.
states.error: Failed to load feed. Retry button.

screens.layout: Large hero card at the top with a glass-frosted overlay. Below it, horizontal carousels (posters with 2:3 aspect ratio). Carousel items bleed off the right edge. No blue used anywhere.

screens.name: Browse
screens.purpose: Search and filter through the entire catalog.

states.empty: No results found for your filters. Clear filters button.
states.error: Failed to load catalog. Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header containing search input and horizontally scrolling filter chips (Format, Genre, Platform). Below, a 2-column grid of poster cards.

screens.name: Rooms (Swipe Mode)
screens.purpose: Tinder-style group swiping to find a movie to watch together.

states.empty: No active rooms. Create or Join CTA.

screens.layout: Lobby screen showing avatars. Swiping screen features a massive full-screen image card (using react-native-reanimated for swipe gestures). A floating glass pill at the bottom houses the actions: Veto (Zinc), Like (Emerald), Superlike (Amber).

screens.name: Content Detail
screens.purpose: Deep dive into a movie/show, showing match score, platforms, and trailer.

states.error: Failed to load details. Retry button.

screens.layout: Parallax backdrop image at the top with a heavy top-to-bottom gradient scrim. Title in large Fraunces font. Match score in a glass badge. Cast horizontal list. Floating primary CTA 'Add to Watchlist' at the bottom.

anime_jujutsu.alt: Anime cosplayer poster representing Jujutsu Kaisen

empty_room.alt: Dark cinematic empty red theater chairs

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Adhere strictly to the 'NO BLUE' policy. Use Zinc (#52525B) for neutral/info states and Emerald/Amber for positive actions.
CRITICAL: Cap all font weights at 500. Do not use 600, 700, bold, or black. Use size (e.g., '2xl', '3xl') and font family (Fraunces vs Satoshi) for hierarchy.

CRITICAL: Any text overlaid on images MUST have a 3-stop top-to-bottom linear gradient scrim (transparent -> 20% surface -> 80% surface) to guarantee contrast. Put the text in the bottom 30% of the image.

SWIPE CARDS: Build the Tinder-style swipe cards using 'react-native-reanimated' and 'react-native-gesture-handler'. The cards should fill most of the screen, with a floating glassmorphic action bar at the bottom.

GLASSMORPHISM: Use 'expo-blur' for the bottom tab bar, sticky headers over carousels, and floating action pill on the swipe screen. Ensure the background behind the glass has a tinted overlay (≥75% opacity) to guarantee readability.
SAFE AREA: Respect safe areas at every screen root. Content must not sit under the notch or home indicator.
HAPTICS: Implement subtle haptics on swipes (left/right/superlike) and major CTA presses.
